---
title: "Sıla Çeliktaş Yalçınkaya"
sidebar: false
---

![](assets/images/vesikalik.jpeg){fig-align="center" width="200"}

# 🎓 Eğitim

- B.S., Electrical and Electronics Engineering, Gazi University, Turkey (2017–2022)
- M.S., Engineering Management, Hacettepe University, Turkey (2025 – ongoing)

# 💼 İş Tecrübesi

## Çalıştığı Yerler

1. ENERJISA – Junior Engineer (2022)  
2. ASELSAN – System Engineer (2022 – ongoing)

## Stajlar

1. AYDEMIR – 2020  
2. ASELSAN – 2021  

# 🚀 Projeler

- TÜBİTAK 1001 Projesi

# 📄 Yayınlar

- Celiktas, S., Inan, A., Aksoy, D. (2022)
